description: Evaluates data management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, platform and process, governance programs, provisioning and retention policies, architecture, DLP, encryption, classification, labelling, flows, backup, resiliency, ownership, transfer, location, and SOC visibility.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A data management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Frequent data management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Data management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for data management

capabilities.name: Data Management platform
capabilities.description: A data management platform manages the enterprise data asset lifecycle enterprise-wide with automation, configuration review, and integrations.
evaluation_focus: Data management platform for data asset lifecycle
Integration with vulnerability, asset, and compliance systems

capabilities.name: Data management process
capabilities.description: A formalized documented data management process applies across data segments with platform automation and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Process scope across all or specific data segments

capabilities.name: Information and Data governance program
capabilities.description: An enterprise-wide information security and data governance program is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide information security and data governance program

capabilities.name: Data Provisioning policies
capabilities.description: Formalized documented policies and processes govern data provisioning and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented data provisioning policy and process

capabilities.name: Data De-Provisioning policies
capabilities.description: Formalized documented policies and processes govern data deprovisioning and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented data deprovisioning policy and process

capabilities.name: Data Modification policies
capabilities.description: Formalized documented policies and processes govern data modification and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented data modification policy and process

capabilities.name: Data retention policies
capabilities.description: Formalized retention policies cover network devices, applications, and devices with frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Data retention policy for network devices
Frequent network device retention policy review

capabilities.name: Data and Privacy officer
capabilities.description: A data and privacy officer architects and maintains the enterprise data governance model.
evaluation_focus: Data and privacy officer for enterprise data governance

capabilities.name: Secure Data Architecture
capabilities.description: A formalized enterprise-wide data architecture is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Data communications
capabilities.description: The data platform enforces secure communication between all data assets.
evaluation_focus: Secure communication between all data assets

capabilities.name: Data modelling
capabilities.description: A formalized enterprise-wide data model is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Data Loss prevention techniques
capabilities.description: DLP mechanisms prevent data exfiltration enterprise-wide with frequent review and policy integration.
evaluation_focus: DLP mechanisms to prevent data exfiltration
Enterprise-wide DLP at network and endpoint
Frequent DLP design and configuration review
DLP integration with policy and contextual decision systems

capabilities.name: Managed Asset Encryption Policy - Applications
capabilities.description: A formalized policy governs encryption of data at rest on all applications and is reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Managed Asset Encryption Policy - Endpoints
capabilities.description: A formalized policy governs encryption of data at rest on all endpoint devices and is reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Managed Asset Encryption Policy - Network
capabilities.description: A formalized policy governs encryption of data at rest and in motion on network devices and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Network device data-at-rest and in-motion encryption policy

capabilities.name: Data quality
capabilities.description: The data management platform measures and reports data quality and integrity with automation and cross-system incorporation.
evaluation_focus: Measure and report data quality and integrity changes
All data assets monitored for quality and integrity
Automated data quality checks and validation
Data quality information incorporated into other systems

capabilities.name: Data Classification
capabilities.description: All data assets are classified automatically where possible, integrated with other systems, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Platform capability to classify data assets

capabilities.name: Supply chain data assessment
capabilities.description: Security assessments for supply chain organizations are defined, reviewed frequently, and automated where possible.
evaluation_focus: Periodic supply chain security assessment process

capabilities.name: Data Labelling
capabilities.description: All data assets are labelled automatically where possible, integrated with other systems, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Platform capability to label data assets

capabilities.name: Data Flow Documentation
capabilities.description: Data flows are mapped for all assets, captured automatically where possible, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Map data flow communications for all data assets

capabilities.name: Master data record
capabilities.description: A master data record for all assets is maintained with automation and audit capabilities.
evaluation_focus: Master data record for all enterprise assets
Audit and identify master data record changes

capabilities.name: Data warehousing
capabilities.description: The enterprise has data warehousing capabilities.

capabilities.name: Data modification
capabilities.description: A formalized process manages data modification across all locations and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Formalized data modification process across all locations

capabilities.name: Data provisioning
capabilities.description: A formalized process manages data provisioning across all locations and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Formalized data provisioning process across all locations

capabilities.name: Data De-Provisioning
capabilities.description: A formalized process manages data deprovisioning across all locations and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Formalized data deprovisioning process across all locations

capabilities.name: Resiliency design
capabilities.description: Multiple paths access data assets with automatic rerouting and resiliency measures.
evaluation_focus: Multiple paths to access data assets during failure
Automatic alternate location or network rerouting
Automatic or manual data resiliency measures

capabilities.name: RPO/RTO metrics are defined
capabilities.description: RPO and RTO metrics are defined per availability policy, apply enterprise-wide, and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: RPO/RTO metrics defined per availability policy

capabilities.name: Backup
capabilities.description: Documented backup policies cover remote storage, automation, backup types, restore measurement, review, and asset management integration.
evaluation_focus: Documented formalized backup policy and process
Full and incremental or differential backups
Restore time measurement against RTO and RPO
Frequent backup policy and process review
Automated backup as part of asset management

capabilities.name: Data retention
capabilities.description: A formalized process governs data retention on network, applications, and devices.

capabilities.name: Data Ownership and stewardship
capabilities.description: Formalized hierarchy governs data ownership, custodianship, and permissions with frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Formalized data ownership and custodianship hierarchy
Clear ownership trail for all data assets

capabilities.name: Secure Data Transfer
capabilities.description: Secure transfer methods protect data movement and sensitive or personal data within regulatory scope.
evaluation_focus: Secure transfer methods for data movement and migration
Protection of personal and sensitive data within regulatory scope

capabilities.name: Data Location
capabilities.description: Rules govern data storage locations including cloud constraints and are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Visibility of data
capabilities.description: Data asset lifecycle logs and activity are logged securely to the SOC including dynamic state changes.
evaluation_focus: Formal process for logging data asset lifecycle to SOC
Secure logging of data asset management logs to SOC
Dynamic data asset state changes captured and transferred to SOC

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
